questions.text: Which mobile network operator is your current primary provider?

questions.text: After watching these ads, which operator are you most likely to consider switching to or subscribing with?
questions.rationale: Measures actual purchase intent impact of the ads, not just recall and likeability.

questions.text: Where do you usually see telecom ads the most?
questions.rationale: Reveals the most effective media channels for telecom advertising exposure.

questions.text: In your own words, what do you think made the Etisalat summer ad stand out compared to the other operators' ads?
questions.rationale: Captures qualitative differentiation insights that closed questions cannot reveal.

questions.text: How much do you typically spend on your mobile line per month?
questions.rationale: Adds spending segmentation to better profile respondents and link ad response to ARPU tiers.
